description: PM Shri Narendra Modi says that as the musical instruments are tuned before they are played so that they produce beautiful sound the Human Body too has to be tuned before we get on with our daily chores. This is where Yoga comes in. Yoga puts the Body in composure and the Mind in composition just like a musician tunes his instrument. It is a necessary discipline that one has to follow to produce good music, even if it the music of life.
fulltitle: PM Shri Narendra Modi compares Yoga with Music
